coin: noun. A piece of currency, usually metallic and in the shape of a disc, but sometimes polygonal, or with a hole in the middle.
con: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Cofán.
conn: noun. The duty of directing a ship, usually used with the verb to have or to take and accompanied by the article "the."
count: verb. To recite numbers in sequence.
cunt: noun. The female genitalia, especially the vulva.
cut: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Teutila Cuicatec.
cutin: noun. A waxy polymer of hydroxy acids that is the main constituent of plant cuticle.
icon: noun. An image, symbol, picture, portrait, or other representation, usually as an object of religious devotion.
inn: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Isinai.
into: preposition. To or towards the inside of.
ion: noun. An atom or group of atoms bearing an electrical charge, such as the sodium and chlorine atoms in a salt solution.
jinn: noun. A human-like spiritual or immaterial being, as opposed to al-ins (people), often invisible but able to manifest in form and also
join: verb. To connect or combine into one; to put together.
jot: noun. The smallest letter or stroke of any writing; an iota.
jun: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Juang.
junco: noun. Any bird of the genus Junco, which includes several species of North American sparrow.
junction: noun. The act of joining, or the state of being joined.
junto: noun. A group of men assembled for some common purpose; a club, or cabal.
jut: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Jutish.
nit: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Southeastern Kolami.
not: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nomatsiguenga.
noun: noun. A word that functions as the name of a specific object or set of objects, such as person, animal, place, word, thing, phenomenon,
nun: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Anong.
nuncio: noun. The ecclesiastic title of a permanent diplomatic representative of the Roman Catholic Church to a sovereign state or international
nut: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nùng.
otic: adjective. Of, relating/pertaining to, or located near the ear.
out: adverb. Away from the inside or centre.
tic: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Tira.
tin: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Tindi.
ton: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Tongan.
tonic: adjective. Pertaining to tension, especially of the muscles.
tui: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Tupuri.
tun: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Tunica.
tunic: noun. A garment worn over the torso, with or without sleeves, and of various lengths reaching from the hips to the ankles.
union: noun. The act of uniting or joining two or more things into one.
unit: noun. Oneness, singularity, seen as a component of a whole number; a magnitude of one.
unto: conjunction. Up to the time or degree that; until.
